data.title: Ashkenazy Acquisition Corp buys 600,000 sq ft Chicago power center for $60 million as part of a $750 million strategy.
data.description: In a recent deal, Ashkenazy Acquisition Corp., a private real estate investment firm led by Ben Ashkenazy, has acquired Orland Park Place, a prominent regional power center located in a densely populated suburb of Chicago. The purchase amount for this acquisition stands at $60 million. This investment is in line with the company's ongoing plan to allocate a total of $750 million towards procuring top-tier retail, hospitality assets, and distressed debt across various regions in the United States.

data.title: Aptera Co-CEO Chris Anthony to speak at A.G.P.'s Electric Vehicles Conference; company's innovation highlighted.
data.description: Today, Aptera disclosed that Co-CEO Chris Anthony is set to take part in A.G.P.'s Annual Virtual Electric Vehicles and Transportation Conference.

data.title: Global Life Sciences BPO Market set to reach $481.8 Billion by 2032 with 7.50% CAGR, fueled by R&D costs and operational needs. Challenges include data security and talent shortages.
data.description: The Life Sciences Business Process Outsourcing (BPO) sector is experiencing significant growth due to escalating Research and Development (R&D) expenditures, heightened regulatory intricacies, and the rising demand for enhanced operational effectiveness within the pharmaceutical and biotechnology industries. Despite these advancements, obstacles including data security risks, shortages in skilled workforce, and difficulties in integration persist.

data.title: National Fuel Gas Co. (NYSE: NFG) approves 53.5 cents/share dividend on 90.4M outstanding common stocks. Payable Jan 15, 2026.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Williamsville, N.Y., the Board of Directors of National Fuel Gas Company (NYSE: NFG) greenlit a standard quarterly dividend of 53.5 cents per share on the firm's common stock. This dividend will be disbursed on January 15, 2026, to shareholders on record as of December 31, 2025. National Fuel Gas Company currently has about 90.4 million common stock shares in circulation and does not have any outstanding preferred stock.

data.title: Ceva-XC21 wins "Best IP/Processor of the Year" at EE Awards Asia for advancing cellular IoT and 5G.
data.description: Ceva, Inc., a prominent licensor of silicon and software IP, was acknowledged for its Ceva-XC21™ in Rockville, Md., on Dec. 5, 2025. The Ceva-XC21™ was commended for its advancements in cellular IoT and 5G connectivity. It features a highly efficient AI-enabled DSP architecture tailored for cost-sensitive IoT and smart-home gadgets. The company, listed on NASDAQ as CEVA, is a frontrunner in providing innovative technology solutions for a range of devices.

data.title: Fed's preferred inflation gauge dipped in September, with consumer sentiment rebounding in December. PCE price index rose by 2.8% year over year and core PCE slowed to 2.8%. Consumer spending increased by $65.1 billion.
data.description: New economic data released on Friday revealed that the Federal Reserve's preferred inflation gauge saw a slight decrease in September, but consumer sentiment showed signs of improvement in early December as inflation expectations cooled. The Bureau of Economic Analysis published the September Personal Income and Outlays report, delayed due to the government shutdown. The headline Personal Consumptions Expenditure (PCE) price index rose by 2.8% year over year in September, matching predictions. Monthly inflation also increased by 0.3%, consistent with expectations. The Core PCE, closely monitored by the Fed, decreased from 2.9% to 2.8%, just below the anticipated 2.9%. Core prices saw a 0.2% monthly increase, as projected. Consumer spending rose by $65.1 billion, a 0.3% increase in line with forecasts and lower than August's 0.5%. Notably, gasoline and other energy goods experienced the largest gains. Find the complete story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Fitch Learning acquires Moody's Analytics and Canadian Securities Institute, expanding its global presence.
data.description: In New York, Fitch Learning, a top provider of financial learning and certifications worldwide, has finalized the acquisition of Moody’s Analytics Learning Solutions (MALS) and the Canadian Securities Institute (CSI). MALS offers credit and digital learning globally, while CSI specializes in certifications for the Canadian finance sector. Fitch Learning, known as a leading financial education provider globally, has successfully acquired these prominent institutions.

data.title: Edward Jones pledges $250,000 to fight food insecurity in 16 Big 12 markets, aiming to make a lasting impact.
data.description: In a recent collaboration with the Big 12 Conference, a wealth management company has pledged $250,000 to address food insecurity within the 16 Big 12 markets. The initiative, announced in Dallas on December 5, 2025, highlights the joint efforts between Edward Jones and the Big 12 Conference in tackling this pressing issue.

data.title: Copenhagen Airports A/S received notice from the Kingdom of Denmark regarding the expiry of the mandatory tender offer period.
data.description: Copenhagen Airports A/S has received a notice from the Kingdom of Denmark through the Ministry of Finance. The announcement was received today and contains important information for the company.

data.title: US prosecutors seek 12-year prison term for Terraform’s Do Kwon, who caused more losses than Sam Bankman-Fried, Alex Mashinsky, and Karl Sebastian Greenwood together.
data.description: A recent sentencing recommendation indicated that Do Kwon was responsible for losses exceeding the combined losses of Sam Bankman-Fried, Alex Mashinsky, and Karl Sebastian Greenwood.

data.title: Investors urged to contact Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP regarding potential losses in DeFi Technologies between May 12 - November 14, 2025.
data.description: Securities Litigation Partner James (Josh) Wilson of Faruqi & Faruqi, LLP is urging investors who incurred losses in DeFi Technologies to reach out to him directly for a consultation. If you bought or obtained securities in DeFi Technologies during the period of May 12, 2025, to November 14, 2025, you may have the opportunity to discuss your options concerning this matter.

data.title: In September, consumer prices saw a slight increase, but the latest PCE index was delayed due to the government shutdown.
data.description: The latest update on the Personal Consumption Expenditures index has been postponed due to the recent government shutdown. This delay impacts the release of crucial data that tracks consumer spending patterns. The index, which provides insights into changes in personal spending habits, is highly anticipated by economists and policymakers alike. The delay is causing concern as the index plays a key role in assessing the country's economic health. The postponement is particularly significant as it affects the analysis of consumer behavior during a period of economic uncertainty. Stay tuned for updates on this important index once the government shutdown concludes.

data.title: Netherlands Data Center Colocation Market to reach USD 2.50 billion by 2030 with 127 existing facilities and 14 upcoming sites.
data.description: In Dublin, a report on the Netherlands Data Center Colocation Market has been recently released, now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. The market was worth USD 1.50 billion in 2024 and is estimated to grow to USD 2.50 billion by 2030, with a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.89%. As of December 2024, there were approximately 127 operational colocation data centers in the Netherlands, a number expected to increase in the coming years.

data.title: Gelteq's study shows advanced gel platform improves oral delivery of oil-soluble drugs. Major breakthrough in pharmaceutical innovation.
data.description: Based in Melbourne, Australia, Gelteq Limited, a company specializing in advanced gel-based oral delivery systems, revealed promising preclinical results on December 5, 2025. The findings showcased the efficacy, adaptability, and safety of Gelteq's unique gel platform, indicating a breakthrough in pharmaceutical development. The study highlighted the platform's ability to improve the oral administration of medications that are oil-soluble or have low solubility. This advancement has the potential to revolutionize drug delivery, addressing a critical issue in the industry.

data.title: Elis disclosed the number of shares and total voting rights as of November 30, 2025.
data.description: Announcement of the total number of shares comprising the capital and the total number of voting rights as of November 30, 2025.
